boundary_rules.policy: riido-client is out of scope for this harness. Codex/local-QA harness work must never be opened, committed, or merged there.

evidence_artifacts.proves: provider evidence, sandboxed daemon install/update evidence, dashboard rendering, run evidence, and optional S3 publication execute as one local acceptance gate
dashboard coverage rows and summary are persisted as machine-readable run evidence, not only rendered as HTML

daemon-owned contract lab calls the real staging AI Agent API directly, recovers token/workspace from storage-state, verifies task multi-assignment/SSE/comment flow when two assignments can be created or when a readable existing task fallback is available, classifies missing daemon/runtime binding as repair evidence, traverses the Figma daemon-boundary intent manifest, records the daily QA freshness loop, and generates a React handoff page without modifying riido-client
macOS launchd can schedule the local acceptance gate once per day and publish daemon-owned API contract evidence to the configured S3 evidence bucket
provider real CLI status, freshness, and repair classification are machine-readable

the public install script can replace an existing daemon binary in a sandbox, report the installed version without touching the user install, and verify the latest GitHub Release has the current platform archive plus SHA256SUMS
local acceptance coverage and repair status are rendered into a reviewable dashboard
contract API evidence updates frontend handoff coverage rows without mocks
atomic feature UI DSL declares the manual QA capture, interaction intent, generated handoff file, and golden pixel tolerance without changing infra hooks
QA contract lab labels are generated from a structured Korean-default i18n DSL instead of template-local string edits
QA DSL search terms, generated artifacts, pre-commit hooks, CI drift checks, and optimization candidates are machine-readable
Daily Evidence Sweep names the once-per-day local QA trigger and defines when the loop is meaningful instead of a bare cron
Domain Fixture Journey names the staging-only entity fixture path for account, workspace, team, project, milestone, task, agent, and thread evidence

human testers can record scenario-level manual QA status and notes in the React contract lab; localqarunner uploads the JSON to latest/manual-qa-evidence.json and the timestamped S3 run folder when the file is present
private or CIDR-limited infra evidence for the S3-hosted local QA dashboard is visible in the central local QA dashboard without committing raw Terraform state or AWS CLI payloads

loop.evaluate: The dashboard and tests fail or surface gaps when provider evidence is stale, repair classification is missing, or product/Figma/release scenarios remain unverified.
loop.execute: Render provider evidence and scenario coverage into the local QA dashboard, then publish the resulting evidence JSON, contract lab, and dashboard HTML.
loop.hypothesis: A local acceptance coverage manifest can make verified, skipped, failed, and not-verified product surfaces visible before release.
loop.observation: Provider real CLI checks produced useful evidence, but product, Figma, release, and repair coverage were still inferred from separate artifacts.
loop.retrospective: Provider QA remains a daily input while uncovered product acceptance scenarios become explicit queue items instead of hidden confidence debt.
